headline: 10x Genomics Stock Up on Atera Launch, Spatial Biology Scale Enhanced
summary: TXG stock jumps after unveiling Atera, a next-gen spatial biology platform aiming to scale single-cell analysis and deepen its role in drug discovery and research.

headline: GEHC & DeepHealth Advance AI Breast Cancer Screening Globally
summary: GE HealthCare expands DeepHealth tie-up to roll out AI-powered mammography tools, improving early breast cancer detection and advancing women's health.

raw.headline: GEHC & DeepHealth Advance AI Breast Cancer Screening Globally

headline: GE HealthCare Mammography AI Deal With DeepHealth Builds Software Revenue Potential
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies (NasdaqGS:GEHC) is expanding its global mammography AI partnership with DeepHealth. The collaboration will integrate AI tools for workflow automation, cancer detection, and automated breast density assessment into mammography systems. The rollout extends beyond the U.S., targeting international breast cancer screening programs and clinical providers. For investors watching AI adoption in healthcare, this move sits at the intersection of medical imaging and...
